claim_boundary: Environment contract only. It stores placeholders and secret names, never credential values, and does not unlock production claims until strict evidence artifacts pass ingestion and validation.

variables.name: WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS
variables.description: Remote WaveMind API regions for active-active namespace sync evidence.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS_MANIFEST_JSON
variables.description: JSON manifest alternative for remote active-active region evidence.

variables.name: WAVEMIND_API_KEY
variables.description: Optional API key used when remote WaveMind endpoints require authentication.
claims: Hosted/serverless p99, cold-start, error-rate, and scale-out SLO.
Non-loopback Kubernetes service-node cluster load SLO.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_API_KEY" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_API_KEY --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES
variables.description: Remote WaveMind API nodes for the external service-node cluster workload.
claims: Non-loopback Kubernetes service-node cluster load SLO.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES_MANIFEST_JSON
variables.description: JSON manifest alternative for external service-node cluster evidence.
claims: Non-loopback Kubernetes service-node cluster load SLO.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES_MANIFEST_JSON" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES_MANIFEST_JSON --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_FREE_GB
variables.description: Optional deterministic free-disk override for FAISS IVF-PQ preflight.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_FREE_GB" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_FREE_GB --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_PATH
variables.description: Persisted FAISS IVF-PQ index path for the 50M streaming profile.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_PATH" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_PATH --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_PGVECTOR_DSN
variables.description: PostgreSQL/pgvector DSN for 10M pgvector service streaming load.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_PGVECTOR_DSN" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_PGVECTOR_DSN --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEY
variables.description: Optional Qdrant API key for the single-service Qdrant production load job.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEY" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEY --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEYS
variables.description: Optional comma-separated Qdrant API keys for sharded Qdrant production load jobs.
claims: 100M+ memories with measured sharded-Qdrant recall, p99, and cost SLO.
Horizontally sharded Qdrant service recall/latency SLO.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEYS" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEYS --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URL
variables.description: Single Qdrant service URL for 10M service-backed streaming load.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URL" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URL --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URLS
variables.description: Comma-separated Qdrant shard URLs for 10M sharded and 100M sharded service load.
claims: 100M+ memories with measured sharded-Qdrant recall, p99, and cost SLO.
Horizontally sharded Qdrant service recall/latency SLO.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URLS" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URLS --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

variables.name: WAVEMIND_SERVERLESS_NODES
variables.description: Deployed serverless/managed WaveMind API nodes for remote telemetry evidence.
claims: Hosted/serverless p99, cold-start, error-rate, and scale-out SLO.
variables.github_secret_command: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_SERVERLESS_NODES" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_SERVERLESS_NODES --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

github_actions.secret_policy: Set these as GitHub Actions secrets or environment-scoped secrets; do not commit their values.
secret_set_commands: printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -
printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_API_KEY" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_API_KEY --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -
printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -
printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES_MANIFEST_JSON" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES_MANIFEST_JSON --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -
printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_FREE_GB" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_FREE_GB --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -
printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_PATH" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_PATH --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -
printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_PGVECTOR_DSN" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_PGVECTOR_DSN --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -
printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEY" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEY --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -
printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEYS" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEYS --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -
printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URL" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URL --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -
printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URLS" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URLS --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -
printf '%s' "$WAVEMIND_SERVERLESS_NODES" | gh secret set WAVEMIND_SERVERLESS_NODES --repo CaspianG/wavemind --body-file -

env_example:
# WaveMind strict production evidence environment
# Fill these locally or as GitHub Actions environment-scoped secrets.
# Do not commit real values.

# Remote WaveMind API regions for active-active namespace sync evidence.
WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS=us=https://wm-us.staging.example.com,eu=https://wm-eu.staging.example.com,ap=https://wm-ap.staging.example.com

# JSON manifest alternative for remote active-active region evidence.
WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS_MANIFEST_JSON={"environment":"staging","source":"kubernetes","deployment_id":"wm-regions-2026-07","regions":[{"id":"us","url":"https://wm-us.staging.example.com"},{"id":"eu","url":"https://wm-eu.staging.example.com"},{"id":"ap","url":"https://wm-ap.staging.example.com"}]}

# Optional API key used when remote WaveMind endpoints require authentication.
WAVEMIND_API_KEY=REDACTED_API_KEY

# Remote WaveMind API nodes for the external service-node cluster workload.
WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES=node-a=https://wm-a.staging.example.com,node-b=https://wm-b.staging.example.com,node-c=https://wm-c.staging.example.com,node-d=https://wm-d.staging.example.com

# JSON manifest alternative for external service-node cluster evidence.
WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES_MANIFEST_JSON={"environment":"staging","source":"kubernetes","deployment_id":"wm-staging-2026-07","nodes":[{"id":"node-a","url":"https://wm-a.staging.example.com"},{"id":"node-b","url":"https://wm-b.staging.example.com"},{"id":"node-c","url":"https://wm-c.staging.example.com"},{"id":"node-d","url":"https://wm-d.staging.example.com"}]}

# Optional deterministic free-disk override for FAISS IVF-PQ preflight.
WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_FREE_GB=8

# Persisted FAISS IVF-PQ index path for the 50M streaming profile.
WAVEMIND_FAISS_IVFPQ_PATH=/mnt/wavemind/faiss/wavemind-ivfpq-50m.faiss

# PostgreSQL/pgvector DSN for 10M pgvector service streaming load.
WAVEMIND_PGVECTOR_DSN=postgresql://USER:PASSWORD@pgvector.staging.example.com:5432/wavemind

# Optional Qdrant API key for the single-service Qdrant production load job.
WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEY=REDACTED_QDRANT_API_KEY

# Optional comma-separated Qdrant API keys for sharded Qdrant production load jobs.
WAVEMIND_QDRANT_API_KEYS=REDACTED_QDRANT_API_KEY_A,REDACTED_QDRANT_API_KEY_B

# Single Qdrant service URL for 10M service-backed streaming load.
WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URL=https://qdrant-10m.staging.example.com:6333

# Comma-separated Qdrant shard URLs for 10M sharded and 100M sharded service load.
WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URLS=https://qdrant-a.staging.example.com:6333,https://qdrant-b.staging.example.com:6333

# Deployed serverless/managed WaveMind API nodes for remote telemetry evidence.
WAVEMIND_SERVERLESS_NODES=https://wm-serverless-a.example.com,https://wm-serverless-b.example.com

checks.name: secret_values_not_serialized
checks.detail: contract uses placeholders and secret names only
